---
title: "The Rev. George William Huntingford"
---

## The Rev. George William Huntingford

**Dates:** 1815-1900

### Description

Commoner Tutor at Winchester College

### Biography

He was subsequently Vicar of Littlemore 1851-72. He was undoubtedly a relation (grandson?, great-nephew?) of the Rt. Rev. George Isaac Huntingford (1748-1832), Bishop of Hereford and Warden of Winchester College.

### Letters

- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
